name: Fleur
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A second-floor one-bedroom apartment in the village heart of Green Coast, Palasë.
description: A second-floor one-bedroom apartment in the village heart of Green Coast, Palasë — the most accessible entry to the resort's stone quarter. An efficient, light plan above the central plaza, with the promenades, pools and Blue Flag beach below.
highlights: Central, a few steps west of the plaza
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Fleur sits at the centre of the village, directly above the parking entrance and a few steps west of the central plaza — hotel and its services are across the plaza, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
